rows.label: qev015603_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo! Dash off and get the Slimy Epithelium,
Ittetsu Iron, and Zedis Twigs, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015603_MSG0002
rows.name:
Once you do, we'll totally make the super machine
Artist Lu thought up, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015603_MSG0003
rows.name:
Look forward to it, yo~! Once that's finished,
everyone in BLADE should become
way stronger than they are now, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015603_MSG0004
rows.name:
Come on, perfectly open a device slot
in your equipment using the device
Lu thought up, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015603_MSG0005
rows.name:
You'll be able to set a ton of devices,
making it super convenient, sa![ST:wait ]
